compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect sprint skill optimization
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Update CLAUDE.md and any relevant documentation to reflect the sprint skill optimization changes: phase renumbering (9→8 phases), merged Phase 3+4, removed Task checklist tracking, model selection decision table.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md phase references updated if any exist
- [ ] Any documentation referencing old phase numbers updated
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with 0 failures

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (edit, if needed)
- Any docs referencing sprint phases
